metadata.direction: Grammar point ID → list of word IDs associated with this grammar pattern.

field_notes.mapping: Reverse of word-to-grammar. Enables 'what vocabulary relates to this grammar?' queries.

metadata.source: Derived cross-reference built from data/grammar/grammar.json, data/core/words.json by build/transform/cross_links.py.
